channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Dow jumps 900 points, Nasdaq lags as investors rotate out of chip stocks for banks, retail: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 fell Thursday as traders dumped chip stocks following an underwhelming report from Broadcom.

item.title: Quantinuum stock opens at $68 per share after IPO
item.description: Honeywell will retain a majority stake in Quantinuum and will continue to be a strategic customer and partner following the listing.

item.title: Ships stranded in Persian Gulf quietly coordinate with U.S. Navy to exit Hormuz
item.description: Clashes erupted between the U.S. and Iran over commercial ships earlier this week.

item.title: Blackstone restricts flagship fund withdrawals as private asset fears reemerge
item.description: Blackstone capped withdrawals from its $79 billion BCRED fund after redemption requests rose from 7.9% to 10%, adding to private market liquidity concerns.

item.title: Long-term unemployment is surging in the U.S. There are hidden costs for workers and the economy
item.description: Long-term unemployment can have ramifications on financial, emotional and family health that linger even after reentry into the workforce.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Five Below, Broadcom, Blackstone, UnitedHealth & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Bitcoin is weathering its ugliest week in months as narrative fades and liquidity rotates
item.description: Bitcoin is getting pummeled to kick off June as the market loses its dominant narrative and liquidity continues to rotate into other assets.

item.title: As the largest World Cup ever kicks off, health officials are focused on more than Ebola
item.description: Officials are more concerned about highly contagious diseases like measles and respiratory viruses, which can spread quickly through large, fast-moving crowds.

item.title: Confirmed screwworm case in Texas sends two biotech stocks higher
item.description: Options volume is surging for Zoetis as traders look for potential stock market winners in light of a screwworm case in Texas.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
item.description: The USDA and Texas officials are working to contain New World screwworm from Zavala County, including establishing an infested zone and enforcing quarantine.

item.title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
item.description: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth more than $866 billion.

item.title: Eli Manning weighs in on Giants QB Jaxson Dart's Trump rally fallout
item.description: Eli Manning spoke about political activities from athletes after Giants QB Jaxson Dart introduced President Donald Trump at a rally.

item.title: Oil prices fall 3% on report Trump reluctant to restart Iran war
item.description: President Donald Trump told aides that he won't resume the war unless U.S. troops are killed, according to The Wall Street Journal.

item.title: This drugmaker is developing breakthroughs like an 'EpiPen for heart attacks.' The market has yet to give it credit
item.description: The key to its growth are a non-opioid pain reliever, a potential blockbuster lupus treatment and a drug that has been dubbed an "EpiPen for heart attacks."

item.title: Sen. Bill Cassidy signs onto brief calling 'anti-weaponization' fund a 'dire threat'
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy joined an amicus brief calling the Justice Department "anti-weaponization" fund a "dire threat."

item.title: Slighted market sectors get their time to shine — plus, Costco keeps packing them in
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
item.description: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

item.title: Ex-Trump advisor John Bolton agrees to plead guilty to retaining classified information: MS NOW
item.description: When he was indicted, John Bolton said he was innocent and that he was being targeted because of his public opposition to President Trump.

item.title: Vibe-coding phenomenon lifts AI startup Supabase to $10.5 billion valuation
item.description: Database startup Supabase announced a $500 million funding round that values the company at $10.5 billion, including the fresh capital.

item.title: Arizona Supreme Court denies prosecutor appeal against sending fake elector case back to grand jury
item.description: The Arizona Supreme Court has denied a prosecutor's appeal of an order that the state's fake elector case be sent back to a grand jury.

item.title: Inside the $850 million Obama Presidential Center ahead of its Juneteenth opening
item.description: President Obama's library will cost $30 to visit, making it the most expensive presidential museum or library in modern history.

item.title: CNBC Select’s weekly mortgage rate snapshot: See your options today
item.description: Here's what mortgage rates are for the week ending June 4, according to Freddie Mac.

item.title: Soaring stocks created 2 million new millionaires around the world last year
item.description: The population of global millionaires surged 7.9% to 25.3 million in 2025, according to the Capgemini World Wealth Report.

item.title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
item.description: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.

item.title: Ramp hits $44 billion valuation as companies look to rein in AI spending
item.description: Ramp's latest funding round was led by ICONIQ, GIC and the Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan.

item.title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
item.description: Amazon engineers called out their employer for conducting mass layoffs while it commits to spending $200 billion this year on AI infrastructure.

item.title: Supreme Court sides with FCC in clash with wireless carriers over fines
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court backed the FCC's system for levying fines, ruling on Thursday ⁠against AT&T and Verizon in their challenge to the agency.

item.title: Pinterest signs $4 billion Amazon deal for cloud services
item.description: Pinterest has been investing in AI tools to boost ‌growth amid intensifying competition from major ‌players such as TikTok and Meta's Instagram and Facebook.

item.title: SpaceX IPO hype has traders flocking to this mid-cap stock
item.description: Options volume is picking up in Nasdaq-listed Echostar, a $35-billion networking business based in Colorado that owns an estimated 3% of SpaceX stock.

item.title: Barclays traders say it's time to buy protection for a tech-led S&P 500 pullback
item.description: The stock market rally could be in trouble here as tech falters, and traders at Barclays think investors should protect themselves.
